page_title: Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone - Complete Records Visual Story Edition - Setting Material Edition
text:
is an artbook for the film Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone created by khara inc.. It was published by Groundworks Co., ltd. on 07 June 2019 for the original price of 3,500 yen + tax. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4905033187 

Overview

An artbook with the settei, comments, and visual story of the Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone film. The cover is illustrated by the animation director Shunji Suzuki.

Contents

Visual Story: Full screenshots of all the film in sequence
Music cue sheet
Additional script collection
Setting/Settei materials
Art Board collection
Promotional materials collection (posters for theater releases, flyers, and other flat media advertisements)
Finalized Screenplay
Poster illustrated by Yoshiyuki Sadamoto 
A B4 poster with the same color illustration is included. 
Staff interviews included in the previous hardcover edition are not included in this edition. https://www.evangelion.co.jp/news/zenkirokusoft0415/ 

Editions

ISBN-10: ISBN 4905033187
ISBN-13: ISBN 978-4905033189
